subject: fix(icons): restore favicon-48x48.png with proper references
body:
Was incorrectly deleted as orphaned when it should have been wired up.
Added <link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="48x48"> in index.html
(browsers prefer PNG over ICO), added to includeAssets for offline
precaching. Build verified.

Tags: icons, pwa, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: glow-props-sync
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01HStghTVMRxyymnHn4AWxUi
title: restore favicon-48x48.png with proper references
